headerDisplay: Controls a GE Profile / SmartHQ Wi-Fi window air conditioner over GE's realtime WebSocket channel (reliable setpoint, mode, and fan control). Enter the same email + password you use in the GE SmartHQ app.

name.title: Accessory Name
name.description: Name shown in HomeKit (you can also rename it in the Home app).

macAddress.title: Appliance ID / MAC (optional)
macAddress.description: Only needed if more than one appliance is on the account. Leave blank to auto-detect the air conditioner.
